home.seoTitle: G.C Windsor | Contemporary Neckties & Men's Accessories
home.seoDesc: An authentic, unique and innovative way to reinvent the necktie.

positioning.title: The G.C. Windsor
positioning.sub: An authentic, unique and innovative way to reinvent the necktie.
positioning.lead: G.C. Windsor introduces a complete evolution to the traditional necktie. A product that sacrifices nothing and only adds to its original design.

split.title: Finally elevating the tie game to new heights
split.lead: A pre-tied knot. A separate tie. Together in seconds, apart just as fast — so a single tie becomes a wardrobe. Change the knot without touching the collar.

founder.quote: If one word would come to mind to describe myself, it would be passion.
founder.bio: I'm passionate about most things revolving around art and fashion. As an artist throughout my life, I have honed my skills to create just about anything I set my mind to. The moment I was able to pair my artistic skills with my love for fashion, my passion grew to an unwavering force.

newsletter.title: Join the house
newsletter.lead: Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates.

shop.seoDesc: The GC Windsor collection — six signature knot and tie combinations.
shop.title: Signature sets
shop.lead: Every set pairs two GC Knots with a GC Tie. Mix them freely — the knot comes off without untying a thing.

about.seoTitle: About | Unleashing Innovation in Men's Fashion
about.seoDesc: Authenticity, quality and efficiency — the three factors behind the hand crafted GC Windsor knot and tie.
about.title: Authenticity, quality and efficiency.
about.lead: These are the three main factors behind the hand crafted, high quality and elegantly designed GC Windsor Knot and Tie.

story.title: It began with a pair of scissors.
body: Just about every invention begins with a quirky idea and the GC Windsor is no exception. After thinking thoroughly of where that idea could lead, I had my eureka moment. What if you could separate the knot from the necktie?

I took that idea back to my home where I initiated the root of my plan. With a pair of scissors and two of my precious neckties, I went ahead and knotted one of them into a pristine double Windsor. Without hesitation I cut the knot out and placed it next to my other tie. From that moment on, a feeling I could never forget sprouted inside me. A passion so ferocious grew within me that I pushed myself to learn how to sew, to the point of mastering the craft.

All of my hard work paid off with my mother's teachings, culminating into the product that we have here today — a complete evolution to the traditional necktie. A product that sacrifices nothing and only adds to its original design. I look forward to what the future holds for the GC Windsor.

founder.name: Jeffrey De La Nuez
founder.bio: I am a hard-working, proud American/Dominican from Florida. My sense of direction and mental fortitude are my strongest traits. This drive of mine will help me turn GC Windsor into a company that will stand the test of time. With my ideals, this company will become a staple of American innovation and eventually stand next to the giants of the fashion industry.
